info.name: رابطة سوق السيارات — Car Marketplace API
info.description: Complete REST API collection for the Car Marketplace mobile app. Set {{base_url}}, {{token}}, and {{locale}} (default: ar) in your environment before running requests.

response.name: 201 Created — Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "تم إنشاء الحساب بنجاح.",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Ahmed Mohamed",
      "email": "ahmed@example.com",

      "is_active": true,
      "notification_enabled": true,
      "theme": "light",
      "avatar_url": null,
      "roles": ["user"],
      "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z"
    },
    "token": "1|abc123...plainTextToken"
  },
  "meta": null,
  "errors": null
}
